use_cases: Trigger form submissions with primary action buttons
Navigate between pages or sections with link-style buttons
Provide destructive actions like delete or remove with variant styling
Create accessible button interfaces with keyboard navigation support
Build consistent UI systems with reusable button variants
ai_summary: A versatile React Button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for polymorphic rendering and variant management. Features multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes with proper accessibility support including focus-visible ring states and disabled handling. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling with ring-offset-background theming support.
